iti3:1.2: This was said by the Blessed One, said by the Arahant, so I have heard:
iti3:1.3: "Abandon one quality, monks, and I guarantee you non-return.Which one quality?
iti3:1.4: Abandon delusion as the one quality, and I guarantee you non-return."
iti3:1.5: The delusion with which beings go to a bad destination, confused: from rightly discerning that delusion, those who see clearly let go. Letting go, they never come to this world again.
iti3:1.6: This, too, was the meaning of what was said by the Blessed One, so I have heard.
